title: Safe existing-branch readmission for interrupted lanes

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit verified before the additive proof and control-plane closeout commit.

runtime_proof.note: Governance/tooling lane with no application-runtime or database implementation changes. Live Supabase verification is required by the T1 packet and completed through the repository's real DB and T1 proof suites.

environmental_skips.test: findExistingCombinations is bounded by the snapshot window and completes fast on live partitioned history (UTV2-1282)
environmental_skips.reason: The most recent provider_offer_history row was older than the 72-hour lookback. The test classified this as stale provider data, not a code regression.

queries: database repository bundle persists submission and settlement
invalid atomic enqueue rolls back lifecycle and outbox writes
invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
invalid atomic settlement rolls back settlement, lifecycle, and audit writes
re-settlement creates an additive correction without duplicate base rows
settlement correction chain preserves the original row

row_counts.note: No lane-specific production rows or schema were changed. Shared live proof fixtures exercised picks, pick_lifecycle, distribution_outbox, distribution_receipts, audit_log, settlement_records, and participants.

pipeline_health_observation.note: Pre-existing worker/backlog condition documented in the lane packet; unrelated to the readmission tooling diff and not treated as a passing runtime claim.
